name: When Does Personality Composition Matter for Multi-Agent LLM Teams?

description: arXiv:2606.27443v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Personality prompting shapes how large language models communicate, yet whether these behavioral shifts affect objective task outcomes remains under-explored.
